level_signals: 3–5 years of experience in Enablement, Program Management, Sales, or Customer Experience roles
Operates autonomously; owns cross-functional programs but no direct reports mentioned

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–5 years of experience in Enablement, Program Management, Sales, or Customer Experience roles
Understanding of key Sales roles, GTM processes, and measurement to effectively partner with Sales leadership on initiatives that strengthen core Sales capabilities and drive revenue growth.
Training delivery experience or an aptitude to deliver in-person/virtual training to Field teams in an engaging and enthusiastic manner
Strong project management skills, with a proven ability to prioritize and drive complex initiatives to completion
Comfort operating autonomously, with experience collaborating across remote and in-office environments
Effective communicator and facilitator, skilled at simplifying complex information for diverse GTM audiences
Experience with global stakeholder management, including Field leadership and cross-functional teams
Proficiency with enablement platforms, Salesforce, LMS systems, and content management tools

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Background in SaaS or Cloud Technology, ideally within the DXP space
Track record in enablement program design, including role-based learning, gamification, and performance tracking
High emotional intelligence, interpersonal fluency, and the ability to build trust across diverse teams
Growth mindset with a bias for action, resilience, and a touch of humor

explicitly_excluded: Visa sponsorship — position is not eligible for visa sponsorship; applicants must be authorized to work without the need for visa sponsorship by the start date of employment

scope.surface: Revenue Enablement programs for GTM teams (Sales, Solution Engineering, Customer Experience, Partner Manager)
primary_metrics_inferred: KPIs and dashboards measuring enablement outcomes
Revenue growth supported by Sales capability initiatives
core_responsibilities: Design and deliver structured enablement programs tailored to Sales, Solution Engineering, Customer Experience and Partner Manager roles
Partner closely with our Sales and broader Field leadership team on initiatives that strengthen core Sales capabilities and drive revenue growth
Own cross-functional collaboration with Marketing, Finance, People and Operations to support company-wide enablement goals
Contribute to measurable performance by using KPIs, dashboards, and feedback loops to optimize enablement outcomes
Act as a program owner and facilitator, delivering in-person and virtual training, e-learning experiences, and onboarding integration
Ensure alignment with Sales Readiness tools, learning pathways, and content management best practices

compensation.equity_form: Stock Options; position eligible for equity awards in accordance with Contentful's equity plans

green_flags: Salary range disclosed ($100K–$136K Colorado; likely higher in other markets)
Comprehensive benefits package including 100% premium coverage for employees
Application deadline stated (06/07/26), suggesting active, not evergreen posting
Clear scope across named GTM teams and cross-functional partners
Company has global presence (Berlin, Denver, SF, London, NYC) with distributed workforce
red_flags: No visa sponsorship — hard cutoff for non-authorized workers
Salary range is only stated for Colorado; other market ranges not disclosed
Location type and exact office requirement are ambiguous — JD mentions hybrid/distributed but doesn't specify office days
Cities listed are all Contentful hubs but the role's specific required location is not definitively stated
